result.reason: The user wants to hide the MultiSSH toolbar, which contains the 'MultiSSH text'. This requires a new setting and a UI toggle.
result.approach: Introduce a new user setting to control the visibility of the MultiSSH toolbar. Implement logic to save and load this setting, and update the toolbar's visibility accordingly. Add a menu item to allow users to toggle this setting.
